infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Nexora attaches your location to attendance check-ins and check-outs so administrators can verify on-site presence. You can deny this and still clock in — your record will be tagged as having no location.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Nexora needs access to your photos so you can pick a profile picture. We only read the image you select; we don't browse your library.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Nexora needs access to your camera so you can take a profile picture.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Nexora attaches your location to attendance check-ins so administrators can verify on-site presence.
